category_sources: source_facts.description says SILE is a modern typesetting system inspired by TeX; official site describes SILE as a typesetting system.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository use the name SILE / The SILE Typesetter.
docs_sources: Official SILE site provides the manual and Lua API documentation under sile-typesetter.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/sile-typesetter/sile; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official SILE documentation describe a CLI typesetting system with Lua extensibility and PDF output.
